duration.$description: Fast/normal/slow cover state transitions; spin/shimmer cover infinite indeterminate loops where the duration is intentionally long enough to read the animation, not just acknowledge it.

normal.$description: Overlay enter/exit, accordion expand, larger transitions.

spin.$description: Infinite spinner loop — button loading, progress-circular indeterminate.

shimmer.$description: Infinite shimmer loop — skeleton placeholder, progress-linear indeterminate slide.
